title: Hyperion Forge
description: Adds the Hyperion to minecraft with forge 1.16.5.
body:
## Features
- Weapon Called Hyperion
  - Right Click Ability:
    - Teleport 10 blocks ahead of yourself
    - At your new location implode dealing (9 - #ofstars) / yourmaxhealth damage (you are immune to it)
  - Left Click Ability:
    - Shoot a beam 
    - All entities within that beam get attacked by your current holding weapon
    - Sword swapping is possible (switching from the Hyperion to a stronger sword to use its stats on the beam attack)
  - The Hyperion is upgradable, you can put stars on it which increases its damage
    - To put a star on your Hyperion, get a nether star in your offhand and right click with the Hyperion in main hand

## Usage
- Download the mod
- install forge
- put the mod into the mods folder
- launch the mod
- give yourself the Hyperion
- or add a craft to it using other mods (not pre-installed craft) I recommend CraftTweaker
- use the Hyperion
